projectDescription: A Textual-based terminal user interface for monitoring PBS Pro HPC schedulers, providing live views of jobs, nodes, and queues with a visual cluster utilization grid.
keyFeatures: Live PBS Pro scheduler data via qstat/pbsnodes with JSON, XML, and text fallbacks
Interactive cluster utilization grid with click-to-inspect job details
Sortable data tables for jobs, nodes, and queues with inline filtering
Four built-in themes: pbs-dark, pbs-light, ansi-dark, ansi-light
Automatic 30-second refresh with manual refresh keybinding
Inline snapshot mode to print a Rich table or Markdown summary non-interactively
Bundled realistic mock cluster (~560 nodes, ~40 jobs) for demo without a live scheduler
Headless mode for CI/automated testing environments
